nasb.text: Then Samson went down to Timnah with his father and mother, and came as far as the vineyards of Timnah; and behold, a young lion came roaring toward him.

esv.text: Then Samson went down with his father and mother to Timnah, and they came to the vineyards of Timnah. And behold, a young lion came toward him roaring.

cnv.text: 參孫跟他的父母下到亭拿去，到了亭拿的葡萄園；忽然見一隻少壯獅子向他吼叫。

ccb.text: 参孙跟父母一起去亭拿，走到亭拿的葡萄园时，有一头壮狮吼叫着扑向他。
